title: galeopsis ladanum subsp. latifolia
intro: Galeopsis ladanum subsp. latifolia, also known as broad-leaved galeopsis, is a subspecies of plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This perennial herb is native to Europe and is also known for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The medicinal properties of Galeopsis ladanum subsp. latifolia include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate coughs, colds, and other respiratory ailments, promoting overall health and well-being.
